0.content:
# 📄 File Audit — DFS Server
Audits who modified files on the DFS server. Uses Object Access events: Access Attempt (4663), Handle Requested (4656), Network Share Check (5145), and Permissions Changed (4670). **Requires**: Audit Object Access policy enabled on file servers.

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4663")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4656")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5145")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4670")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4663") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4656") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5145")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "4663", "Object Access",
    else: if(winlog.eventid == "4656", "Handle Request",
    else: "Share Check"))
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:1h

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4663")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:SubjectAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Object Name:\t\t' DATA:ObjectName EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Access Mask:\t\t' DATA:AccessMask EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, SubjectAccount, ObjectName
| filterOut contains(SubjectAccount, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5145")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:SubjectAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Share Name:\t\t' DATA:ShareName EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Relative Target Name:\t' DATA:FileName EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Source Address:\t\t' DATA:SourceIP EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, SubjectAccount, ShareName, FileName, SourceIP
| filterOut contains(SubjectAccount, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

16.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4663")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:SubjectAccount EOL"""
| filterOut contains(SubjectAccount, "$")
| summarize AccessCount = count(), by:SubjectAccount
| sort AccessCount desc

18.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4663")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Object Name:\t\t' DATA:ObjectName EOL"""
| filterOut isNull(ObjectName)
| summarize AccessCount = count(), by:ObjectName
| sort AccessCount desc

20.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4670")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| sort timestamp desc
